integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:2285-2509 enforces output-saved-before-registration (failure row persists artifact_ref with null registration; retry binds registration later) and source refs (prompt_json_ref/parent_artifact_ref) are required-portable; tests/atelier_comfy_intake_routing_tests.rs:200-316 proves on live PG that artifact_ref is durable before any registration_id, then registration bound on retry. Sidecar/parent-ref invariant enforced in record_intake_output:2081-2096.
